synopsis: Star Wars: Dark Times: Blue Harvest is the fourth arc in the Star Wars: Dark Times series of comics. It consists of five regular comic issues, as well as two special 8-page issues published by Myspace / Dark Horse Presents. The online issues are collected in the TPB and also reprinted in a special comic issue Dark Times: Blue Harvest 0 in the original black-and-white form. The title is inspired by the fake name George Lucas gave Episode VI Return of the Jedi in 1983.
title: Dark Times: Blue Harvest #0
